backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor file serving as a placeholder backend with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the Facebook link addition to Footer.tsx with high confidence, linking to test ID REQ-1.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, hooks, and configuration, describing the complete structure of the GURU & ASSOCIATES consulting website.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including sidebar, chart, and semantic color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO-optimized title and meta description for GURU & ASSOCIATES SERVICES PRIVATE LIMITED consulting services in Goa.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component composing all page sections (Navbar, Hero, About, Services, Testimonials, Photos, Contact, Footer) into a single-page layout.
frontend/src/components/contact/ContactF: Contact form with client-side validation for name, email, and message fields, displaying success state locally without backend integration.
frontend/src/components/contact/OfficeLo: Interactive map component displaying two office locations (Ponda head office and Marcel branch) using OpenStreetMap iframe with SVG overlay markers and connecting line.
frontend/src/components/sections/About.t: About section with mission statement, three feature cards (Expert Guidance, Client-Centered, Comprehensive Solutions), and three division cards for the company's business units.
frontend/src/components/sections/Contact: Renders a contact section with office location details (head office in Ponda and branch in Marcel), contact information (phone, email, address), an embedded map component, and a contact form for user inquiries.
Displays a footer with company branding, quick navigation links, contact information, social media icons (Facebook, X, LinkedIn, Instagram), and copyright notice with a "Made with ❤️" attribution.
frontend/src/components/sections/Hero.ts: Hero section featuring a headline about tax, financial, and property consulting in Goa, a descriptive paragraph, call-to-action buttons ("Get Started" and "Our Services"), and a hero image showcasing investment services.
Sticky navigation bar with company logo, desktop menu links (About, Services, Reviews, Photos, Contact), mobile hamburger menu using Sheet component, and smooth-scroll behavior for all navigation actions.
Photo gallery management section allowing users to upload images (PNG, JPG, WebP up to 5MB), store them as data URLs in persisted storage, display thumbnails in a grid, and delete individual photos or clear all with validation and error handling.
frontend/src/components/sections/Service: Services showcase section displaying five service categories (Loan Consultancy, Other Services, Tax Consultant, Investment Advisory, Property Consultancy) in card format, each with an icon and a bulleted list of specific offerings.
frontend/src/components/sections/Testimo: React component that displays a grid of three client testimonials with quotes and names, using Card components and a Quote icon.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Comprehensive React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/usePersistedPhotos.ts: Custom hook for managing photo items in localStorage with a 4MB size limit, providing add, remove, and clear operations with error handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file indicating no backend queries are needed for the brochure website.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a light blue color scheme for both light and dark modes, plus base styles for accessibility and smooth scrolling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH color system, container settings, animations, and typography/container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking features, requests, and architectural state, including a completed Facebook link feature and a pending request to connect Facebook account.
